menus.trifold_note: Our comprehensive selection of beers, ciders, spirits, and soft drinks, thoughtfully curated for your enjoyment across six panels.

items.name: Oundle Gold Best Bitter
items.detail: A traditional, malty best bitter with a floral hop aroma. 4.2% ABV, Northamptonshire.

items.name: Market Square Pale Ale
items.detail: A refreshing, citrus-hopped pale ale with a crisp finish. 4.0% ABV, Northamptonshire.

items.name: River Nene Lager
items.detail: A clean, crisp and refreshing premium lager. 4.8% ABV, British.

items.name: Fenland Craft IPA
items.detail: A vibrant, fruity IPA bursting with tropical hop flavour. 5.5% ABV, Cambridgeshire.

items.name: Heritage Stout
items.detail: A rich, dark stout with notes of coffee and chocolate. 4.5% ABV, British.

items.name: Orchard Bloom Cider
items.detail: A cloudy, medium-dry apple cider with a refreshing tang. 4.5% ABV, West Country.

items.name: Saxon Ale
items.detail: A full-bodied amber ale with a smooth caramel finish. 500ml, 4.8% ABV, British.

items.name: Coastal Pilsner
items.detail: A light and crisp bottled pilsner, perfect for any occasion. 330ml, 4.2% ABV, European.

items.name: Wild Blossom Cider
items.detail: A lightly sparkling, sweet berry cider. 500ml, 4.0% ABV, Somerset.

items.name: George House Lager
items.detail: Our signature premium bottled lager. 330ml, 5.0% ABV, British.

items.name: Zero Alcohol Pale Ale
items.detail: All the flavour, none of the alcohol. 330ml, 0.5% ABV, British.

items.name: Coca-Cola
items.detail: Refreshing cola. 330ml bottle.

items.name: Diet Coke
items.detail: Sugar-free cola. 330ml bottle.

items.name: Lemonade
items.detail: Crisp and sparkling lemon refreshment. 330ml bottle.

items.name: Fentimans Rose Lemonade
items.detail: Botanically brewed, delicately floral lemonade. 275ml bottle.

items.name: Fever-Tree Indian Tonic Water
items.detail: Premium tonic with quinine. 200ml bottle.

items.name: Fever-Tree Light Tonic Water
items.detail: Low-calorie premium tonic. 200ml bottle.

items.name: Fever-Tree Ginger Ale
items.detail: Naturally refreshing ginger ale. 200ml bottle.

items.name: Soda Water
items.detail: Crisp and clean soda water. 200ml bottle.

items.name: Orange Juice
items.detail: Freshly poured orange juice.

items.name: Apple Juice

items.name: Pineapple Juice

menus.trifold_note: A carefully chosen collection of wines from around the world, perfect for any occasion, presented across six panels.

items.name: Riverbend Sauvignon Blanc
items.detail: Crisp and refreshing with notes of gooseberry and citrus.

items.name: Northern Italian Pinot Grigio
items.detail: Dry and light-bodied with hints of green apple and pear.

items.name: Central Valley Chardonnay
items.detail: Unoaked, with vibrant tropical fruit flavours and a smooth finish.

items.name: South African Chenin Blanc
items.detail: Fruity and aromatic with delightful notes of honeydew and peach.

items.name: Crisp Dry White
items.detail: Our house white, always a delightful and versatile choice.

items.name: Provence Style Rosé
items.detail: Delicate and dry, with subtle red berry and floral notes.

items.name: Californian Blush
items.detail: A medium-sweet rosé, bursting with ripe strawberry and watermelon flavours.

items.name: Summer Berry Rosé
items.detail: Light and refreshing with abundant summer fruit aromas.

items.name: Smooth Valley Merlot
items.detail: Soft and supple with plum and blackcurrant fruit, a versatile favourite.

items.name: Andean Malbec
items.detail: Rich and bold, with dark fruit flavours and a hint of spice.

items.name: Australian Bush Shiraz
items.detail: Full-bodied with notes of blackberry, pepper, and a touch of vanilla.

items.name: Spanish Tempranillo
items.detail: Medium-bodied with red cherry and smoky vanilla notes, a classic choice.

items.name: Coastal Cabernet Sauvignon
items.detail: Robust and structured with blackcurrant and cedar aromas.

items.name: Burgundian Chablis
items.detail: Elegant and mineral-driven, with crisp apple and citrus notes.

items.name: Loire Valley Sancerre
items.detail: Sophisticated and aromatic, with vibrant acidity and herbaceous undertones.

items.name: Piedmont Barolo
items.detail: A powerful and complex red, with rose, tar, and cherry notes. Requires decanting.

items.name: Classic Bordeaux
items.detail: A timeless blend, offering rich black fruit, fine tannins, and a long finish.

items.name: English Sparkling Wine
items.detail: A refined and elegant brut, with crisp apple and brioche notes.

items.name: Spanish Cava Brut
items.detail: Bright and refreshing, with a delicate mousse and green fruit character.

items.name: House Champagne Brut
items.detail: Our chosen house Champagne, a classic expression of celebration.

items.name: Italian Prosecco DOC
items.detail: Light, fresh, and fruity with vibrant apple and pear notes.

items.name: Italian Rosé Prosecco DOCG
items.detail: Elegant pink bubbles with delicate red berry and floral aromas.

items.name: Miniature Prosecco (200ml)
items.detail: A perfectly sized bottle for a personal celebration.

items.name: Classic Ruby Port
items.detail: Youthful and vibrant, with rich red fruit flavours.

items.name: Matured Tawny Port
items.detail: Smooth and complex, with nutty and dried fruit characteristics.

items.name: Late Bottled Vintage Port
items.detail: A single vintage port, aged for richness and depth.

sections.name: Wine by the Glass & Bottle Pricing

items.name: Smaller Measures
items.detail: A 125ml glass measure for still wines is available upon request.

items.name: All Wines by the Glass
items.detail: Every wine offered by the glass is also available by the bottle. Please ask your server.

items.name: Sparkling Serves
items.detail: Our sparkling wines and Prosecco are served in elegant 125ml flutes, or by the bottle.

menus.trifold_note: Crafted cocktails, from timeless classics to our unique George Inn creations, shaken or stirred to perfection across six panels.

items.name: Oundle Orchard Spritz
items.detail: Elderflower gin, apple liqueur, prosecco, soda, fresh mint and apple slices.

items.name: Market Town Martini
items.detail: Local gin, apricot liqueur, fresh lemon juice, and a dash of orange bitters.

items.name: Nene River Sour
items.detail: Whisky, cherry liqueur, fresh lemon juice, and a hint of maple syrup, garnished with a cherry.

items.name: George Inn Negroni Twist
items.detail: Gin, sweet vermouth, Campari, infused with a subtle hint of spiced orange peel.

items.name: Espresso Martini
items.detail: Vodka, coffee liqueur, and freshly brewed espresso, shaken to perfection.

items.name: Old Fashioned
items.detail: Bourbon, sugar, Angostura bitters, stirred over ice with an orange twist.

items.name: Mojito
items.detail: White rum, fresh mint, lime, sugar, topped with soda water.

items.name: Pornstar Martini
items.detail: Vanilla vodka, passion fruit liqueur, passion fruit purée, served with a shot of Prosecco.

items.name: Margarita
items.detail: Tequila, orange liqueur, fresh lime juice, served with a salted rim.

items.name: Aperol Spritz
items.detail: Aperol, Prosecco, and a splash of soda, garnished with an orange slice.

items.name: Elderflower Spritz
items.detail: Elderflower liqueur, Prosecco, and soda, with a lemon twist and mint.

items.name: Limoncello Spritz
items.detail: Limoncello, Prosecco, and soda, finished with a lemon wheel.

items.name: George Garden Fizz
items.detail: Cucumber, elderflower cordial, fresh lime, topped with soda water.

items.name: Berry Delight
items.detail: Mixed berries, cranberry juice, a hint of mint, and lemonade.

items.name: Tropical Sunset
items.detail: Pineapple, orange, and grenadine, creating a vibrant, fruity blend.

items.name: Luxury Gin & Tonic
items.detail: Premium London Dry gin served with a choice of Fever-Tree tonic and bespoke garnishes.

items.name: Premium Spiced Rum Serve
items.detail: Aged spiced rum served with ginger ale, fresh orange, and a cinnamon stick.

items.name: Finest Whisky Highball
items.detail: A distinguished Scottish single malt, topped with premium soda water and a lemon twist.

items.name: Autumn Spice Old Fashioned
items.detail: Bourbon, spiced apple syrup, and bitters, garnished with a dried apple slice and cinnamon.

items.name: Winter Berry Bellini
items.detail: Prosecco with a purée of festive winter berries, a seasonal favourite.

items.name: Summer Breeze Gin Fizz
items.detail: Gin, fresh lemon, cucumber, and elderflower, topped with sparkling wine.
